Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (firearmГўВҖВүГўВҖВ”ГўВҖВүdefinition of variant)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (firearmГўВҖВүГўВҖВ”ГўВҖВүdefinition of variant)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Criminal Code to provide a definition of ГўВҖВңvariantГўВҖВқ in order to limit its application to certain firearms.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Subsection.Text: Subsection 84(1) of the Criminal Code is amended by adding the following in alphabetical order:

Definition.Text: variant, in respect of a firearm, means a firearm that has the unmodified frame or receiver of another firearm. (variante)

Subsection.Text: The definition prohibited firearm in subsection 84(1) of the Act is amended by striking out ГўВҖВңorГўВҖВқ at the end of paragraph (c), by adding ГўВҖВңorГўВҖВҷГўВҖВҷ at the end of paragraph (d) and by adding the following after paragraph (d):

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: any variant of a firearm described in any one of paragraphs (a) to (d).

Subsection.Text: The definition restricted firearm in subsection 84(1) of the Act is amended by striking out ГўВҖВңorГўВҖВқ at the end of paragraph (c), by adding ГўВҖВңorГўВҖВҷГўВҖВҷ at the end of paragraph (d) and by adding the following after paragraph (d):

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: any variant of a firearm described in any one of paragraphs (a) to (d).
